description: Install dependencies and verify the project builds cleanly before making changes.
steps: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify TypeScript compiles without errors
Run `npx vite build` to verify the Vite bundle succeeds
acceptance_criteria: `npx vite build` exits with code 0 and produces dist/ output
verification: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` and confirm exit code 0
Run `npx vite build` and confirm exit code 0
findings: All three steps passed on first attempt. npm install added 49 packages. tsc --noEmit clean. vite build produces dist/ with one 1.2MB chunk (Phaser bundled). No issues found.
